features: 【Support 100W Fast Charging】Supports up to 100W(20V 5A) charging speed, with a max output of 100W charger, SooPii USB C to USB C cable can charge anything Type-C devices from phones to laptops. Pair with a 100W USB-C Power Delivery charger to power up a MacBook Pro 16ʺ in 2 hours. (NOTE: This is a data transfer and USB 2.0 version charging cable, and does not support video output.)

【Smart Power Display】Real-time charging power visible, show charging status and signify high power process. Built-in smart chips monitoring the charging power and adjusting current and voltage automatically, avoiding damage to the battery in case of unstable current.(Please note display module just show charging power, it neither increase nor decrease charging current)
【Ultimate Durability】Based on 36,000+ bends strict tests, with special zinc alloy design and wearing rugged nylon braided exterior, SooPii Charging cable serve you longer and stronger.

【Wide Compatibility】Works effortlessly with any USB-C device including phones, tablets, and laptops. Compatible with MacBook Pro 13'', MacBook Pro 15'', MacBook Air 2018, lPad Air 2020 10.9” (4th generation), lPad Pro 12.9''/11'', Galaxy S21/ S21 Ultra/ S20/ S20+/ S20 Ultra/ Note 10/ Note 10 Plus/ , Google Pixel 2/3/3a/4 XL, Switch/Switch Lite and more. ( Note: Please use a 100W USB-C wall charger to achieve fast charging. )
【What you Get in Box】1 x SooPii S10CC PD Charging Cable ,our worry-free 24-months warranty and friendly Customer Service.
description: Product Description Notes: Do not charge your Devices from an Adaptor in excess 100W,Overload Outputs above rating may result in the Adaptor/Cable and your device Overheating. (note: these phone models do not support Super Fast Charging, but can support PD Fast Charging) Previous page Next page Use In Multiple Places,Cover Your Needs Anywhere 1 At Home 2 In the Office 3 In the Car There is no data loading,the display shows 0 watts? Please use the C port with LED display to connect your device (Macbook /laptop/phone or other device), the other end with "Soopii "logo connect to wall charger. Tried it with a 100W fast charger but unable to achieve 100W max? Why not it keeps showing 100W? The display power of cable lies on loading power of your device, in princple, the loading power is the max wattage or peak wattge in charging. The usb device end port is too tight and required too much effort to insert and remove,will it damage my device ports The cable connector can be inserted in the correct way every time,Sturdy construction has connectors with molded strain relief for frequent unplugging and durability; Robust USB Type-C connector clicks into place for a snug and secure connection. Will this usb c cable with Led display influence charging? This USB-C to USB-C cable is real-time reflect the wattage in charging, to verify it's accuracy, is same as other cables, it will not influence your charging, but only display wattage in real-time. When your device is getting full, how the display shows? In pratical charging, the charging is curvilinear, the charging wattage will increase from 0 to max then decrease to 0 as long as your device is getting full.
